feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: OpenID redirect error when accessing SAP Build Process Automation API from Microsoft Power Apps.
entry.content:
I can instantiate a BPA instance fine using POSTMAN but am having issues doing the same in Microsoft Power Apps (MPA) custom connection.

The MPA connection is setup to call https://ndbs-build.authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/authorize  using the client credentials but is returning the following BTP error..

OpenID provider cannot process the request because the redirect_uri does not match the configuration. Please contact your system administrator.

I believe the reason it works in POSTMAN is because there is no redirect url, but in MPA this is enforced as 

https://global.consent.azure-apim.net/redirect/(id).

I've looked into possible resolutions and it looks like I need to include the redirect in BTP like so...

 

"oauth2-configuration": {

"redirect-uris": [

"<MPA Url>"

]

}

However, this is a BPA instance that has it's own uaa, which cannot be edited, so I'm not sure how the redirect-uris can be added.

Another suggestion is to add the redirect uri in Security > Oauth clients, which is not showing. 

Assuming I can get Admin access, what is the correct approach to allow a BPA instance to be called from MPA?

entry.title: How to Trigger a Process in SAP Build Process Automation while Using Action Group and form
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m working with SAP Build Process Automation, and I’ve created a process that includes an Action Group to fetch external data, which I intend to use to populate fields in a Form. I’ve set up the Action Group to retrieve the data, and the form to display this data to the user.

My question is: once the process is deployed, how do I actually trigger this process to start? Specifically:

Do I need to set up a trigger?

How do I configure the trigger for this process to begin?

What type of trigger is recommended for a scenario where data is fetched externally and then shown in a form?

For context, my process should:

Fetch data from an external system via an Action Group.

Populate a field in the Form with the fetched data.

Allow the user to submit the form after the data is populated.

entry.title: Retention period for tasks completed in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi,
I can't seem to see data prior to 30 days in Build Process Automation's Monitoring-Process and Workflow Instances.
Can I change this number of days?
Kind regard

entry.title: How to use events in SAP business accelerator hub in SAP Build?
entry.content:
Hi guys,

We are trying to automate a process whenever an employee is hired through success factors. The general overview is that:

1. New employee is onboarded in SF and the EmployeeHire event in SF will be triggered

2. A process in SAP Build Process Automation is called when the event above is triggered, and should automatically start the process flow

Upon browsing, we saw in SAP Business Accelerator Hub these SF events and tried to use it as the event trigger in SBPA, however, we do not know how the 2 will connect. 

The steps we've currently taken are

1. Under SAP Build > Connectors > Events > Create > choose SAP Business Accelerator Hub as event source > Filter products to only show SAP SuccessFactors > choose an event package (for trying out purposes, we've chosen Employee Central Position Notification Events)

2. Create new SAP Build Process Automation > Create Process > choose Wait for an event as trigger > choose Employee Central Position Data processed

After above steps, we are now in the dark on what are the next steps. One of our main questions is that how will SBPA know which SF system to listen to? Where should this be set/configured? Once these connections are done, are there other steps that we need to do? Any help on how we can achieve the general overview is very much appreciated.

Thanks,

erza

entry.title: SBPA - Imported project is no longer editable
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We have recently moved our SBPA subscription from one subaccount to another, and we only exported a specific version of our project instead of the editable version, so now we have a view only project that we would have to copy or recreate. I'd like to keep the id though. 

Is there a way to make this imported project editable?

Regards,

Gabriela

entry.title: How to use SAP BPA send Adaptive Cards to personal Teams chat?
entry.content:
Hey guys, 

I’m building a process in SAP Build Process Automation, and in the Approve step, I want to send the form as an Adaptive Card to Microsoft Teams so that the user can approve it directly in Teams. Is that possible?

If you know, can you please share the solution with me?

Thank in advance

Giang

entry.title: SAP Workflow Management Business Rule's Rulesets Capability available in BPA?
entry.content:
Dear All,

Using SAP Workflow Management's Business Rules Capability, we've created project which contains rules (e.g. R1, R2, R3, R4, R5, etc), rulesets, etc. For each ruleset, we setup sequential execution of rules. In other words, a single rule is consumed by multiple rulesets, which is then used in multiple rule services. For example, ruleset1 contains R2, R4 and R5; ruleset2 contains R1, R2, R3 and R4. 

please advise whether the above ruleset capability can be found in SAP Build Process Automation. If no, is there any workaround. Thank you.

entry.title: How to add URL parameters to a function import call in Action Project in SAP BPA
entry.content:
Hi All,

Greetings of the day!

I am facing a peculiar issue in using Function Imports from oData services in Actions Projects.

The scenario is as follows:

  • Using Action Groups in automation to replace individual API calls being made previously.
  • The action project has been created using a destination and an oData end point.
  • A single Action Project created where Get, Post and Patch calls are working.
  • Issue is in Function Imports for the same Action Project.

Issue Description:

1. On adding the function import, the URL parameters are listed in Body of the Input.

If I test using this, I get the error:

Invalid Function Import Parameter '<ParameterName>'

2. If I remove the keys from the Body, and manually add them in the parameters as query/header/path/custom

On testing this gives one of the two types of errors:

a. Invalid Function Import Parameter '<ParameterName>'

b. The call throws a javascript error in console log and the screen remains in busy mode.

Is there a way, in which I can introduce the URL parameters in the suffix, instead of adding these parameters through body/parameters?

How would I go about doing this.

Working custom web service call URL:

Action Project, looks issue:

Best Regards,

Rohit

entry.title: Issue with artifact_content quota
entry.content:
I have facing issue with artifact_content quota , Can any one guide

How to increase artifact_content quota for specific sub-account.

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - Sequence of automated forms
entry.content:
Hey everybody,

we have been asked by a customer to update their processes within excel to #BuildProcessAutomation

We want to automate the workflow of customer data changing and manipulation. There are 6 forms that need to be integrated within build apps with different intentions, e.g. one form to change customer data, one form to delete a customer, one form to create a new customer, etc.

Here are our thoughts for the planned process:

1. First form to choose from a list of the 6 forms, with an explanation, for what every following form is needed.

2. The User decides for one form from the list. Now the chosen form needs to open flawless within the same browser window and without the systems information "Form succesfully sent". 

We thought about these two options: 

1. A dropdown to choose the form. Click on the "submit" button, and somehow the chosen form opens and can be filled with the needed data.

or

2. A list within the form with links to each of the following needed forms, that the user can click on, and the next form opens.

Which ideas do you have? Or does anyone have recommondations on how to build this process?

Thank you very much everybody.

entry.title: Give me a access for SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi All,

I tried to do one scenario, finally i achieved but i have seen some error.

Could you please resolve this error and mentioned below.

Thanks and Regards,

sowmiya

entry.title: IRPA - count unique values in array
entry.content:
Hi, I am using activity get values (cells). This gives list of values. Using this variable and embedding it with ".length" it gives number of values. But how to count unique values? IRPA suggest things like ".count" or ".unique" but it gives empty result. I have also tried to use custom script like this one:

const arr = RunID;
function countUniqueArray(arr) {
const Result = [];
arr.forEach(item => {
if (!Result.includes(item)) {
Result.push(item);
}
});
return Result.length;
}

return(countUniqueArray(arr));

But issue is:

1) when RunID (returned values from excel) are passed directly, counting of unique values does not work and gives only total number of items correctly, but not unique values

2) when insted of RunID I hard code something like ["apple", "banana", "apple", "orange"] it works correctly and returns 3

So either change input to something like in 2) (but how) or use some javascript function directly in one of the steps.

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: BAS: Workflow UI (MTA) deployment error
entry.content:
I'm trying to create workflow task UI using BAS's template "Workflow UI".

Reference blog - Create an SAP UI5 Task for a Business Process | SAP Tutorials

I'm able to deploy this app in my trial account and it is working as expected but when I'm deploying the same app in the client's subaccount, it throws error: Error monitoring creation or update of services: Error creating service "ApprovalApp-destination-service" from offering "destination" and plan "lite": Service broker error: Service broker destination-service-broker failed with: Failed to create a destination service instance with the user provided configuration. 

I'm able to deploy Freestyle SAPUI5 apps and CAPM apps in the same subaccount and destination service(plan-lite) instance is also getting created successfully. It throws this error only in case of Workflow UI app it seems.

 

If anyone has encountered a similar scenario or has insights into this issue, your suggestions or assistance would be greatly appreciated.
 
Thanks in advance for your support.
 
Best regards,
Adarsh

entry.title: Will extra fee will be incurred if desktop agent will be needed to use in automation process of SBPA
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am now checking for how to attach the file (that is uploaded in the DMS via sap build process automation approval request) to email.

And I found one approach that will be needed to create automation process and use desktop agent.

The approach steps are

1. upload the file via sap BPA approval request

2. file will be uploaded in the DMS

3. create automation process that is able to download the file of DMS to local PC path

4. attach the local PC path in send mail activity

 

For step 3 and step 4, the automation process is needed to create and desktop agent is needed to use.

And as my checking, if we use desktop agent, we will need to subscribe for attendant or unattedant mode.

Is my understanding correct and if this approach will be use, the extra fee of using desktop agent will be incurred or not?

 

If yes, since the fee of attendant or unattendant is a bit pircey, is there any possible workaround that can be processed like that kind of approach (sending attachment to mail from sap BPA) without costing any extra fee?

Could you please give any idea on it?

entry.title: Could NOT subscribe SAP build process automation for my BTP trial account
entry.content:
Dear all gurus,

  I have just created my BTP trial account and chosen SG server. I want to subscribe "SAP build process automation" (free plan). However, it failed for several times. Might I know how to solve the issue? Thanks.

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation free plan screen
entry.content:
Hi Learners,

Why the Free tier SAP Build process Automation is showing like this? I was doing Develop and automate with SAP Build course and doing this section Automating Processes with SAP Build Automation.

Regards

Kunal Bisht

entry.title: SAP Task Center with SAP Build Process Automation no Approve/Reject button on Mobile Start
entry.content:
Hi,

I activated SAP Task Center connecting it to SAP Build Process Automation.

So far so good, but when I view the task on SAP Mobile Start it is not presenting the Approve/Reject buttons.

Does anyone know if it is a product limitation or if I am missing a configuration somewhere?

Regards,

Mauricio

entry.title: Destination not showing in define variables in build process automation
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

In SAP Build Process automation I'm using environment variables for a destination to my process automation instance. When i'm deploying my project the destination is not listed.

 

The additional properties i use in my destination are:

Does anyone know what i'm doing wrong? Thanks in advance

entry.title: Build Process Automation in virtual environment does not work correctly
entry.content:
Hi, I have an automation that uses web and sap ui SDKs. It runs on S/4 public cloud in Fiori Launchpad in browser. The goal is to have this automation in virtual environment. However when I tried to run the scenario, that worked fine when beiing connected to virtual environment and running it from there, it worked. But whenever I minimize Windows app (that I use for remote connection) or disconnect completely and run the trigger from elsewhere, it starts but actually doesnt do what I need.

Automation gets to bookmark Payments processed and should get number of lines. It actually does that but count is not 2 like in picture below, but zero.

This is what it actually gets in trace:

Any idea how to fix this issue?

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Build Process Automation fails only to send emails within process execution
entry.content:
I have added a process to send an email within a BPA process.

On the BTP Cockpit, we have set Destination to an external SMTP mail service (using Amazon SES), and test mail sending from [Control Tower] -> [Mail Server] in BPA is sending mail without problems.

When I send an email in the process, I am getting an authentication error, but I don't know how to resolve it.
Does the handling of authentication information in Destination change in the process?

Could not send email: The server 'XXXXXXXXXXXXX.amazonaws.com' could be reached, but the login with the given credentials failed. The server has returned the following message: '535 Authentication Credentials Invalid'.
